pi_items.source: export_result.sh searches for exact regexes \bcavy\b, \brodent\b, and \bsouth\s+america\b

privileged_info_summary: I verified the task scripts and expectations against real Wikimedia data. I discovered three critical defects making the task fundamentally impossible to complete successfully and unscorable: 1) The required image URL in the instructions (https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/34/Capybara_grazing.jpg) is hallucinated/fabricated and permanently returns an HTTP 404 error (verified via MediaWiki API). 2) The export_result.sh script strictly checks for the regex '\bcavy\b', but the real English Wikipedia summary for 'Capybara' only contains the plural form 'cavies', guaranteeing failure for any agent that accurately fetches the real article data. 3) The 'verifier.py' script explicitly referenced in task.json is entirely missing from the task environment.
